name: yxstock
description: A 股行情展示与分析 Web 应用

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @yxstock/server" "npm run dev -w @yxstock/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @yxstock/shared && npm run build -w @yxstock/server && npm run build -w @yxstock/web
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @yxstock/shared && npm run typecheck -w @yxstock/server && npm run typecheck -w @yxstock/web
